productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Twilight Black Shoes
description: There's nothing better than a lightweight technical shoe that provides loads of comfort and durability. The nike Air Twilight Mid shoe is a powerful sneaker, with its simple style and extremely durable construction. Upper Suede upper with synthetic overlays for durability Meshed and padded collar and tongue for all day comfort High ankle collar and heel cup for better support to the lower leg Lacing system for snug, customised Fit Removable footbed to accomodate an orthotic nike swoosh on either sides and brand name on the collar Midsole PU midsole for lightweight cushioning and comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with flex grooves for traction and absolute grip Waffle patterned lugs on the outsole Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
